updates.title: Earnings Analysis · NVDA Q1 FY2027
updates.teaser: NVDA Q1 FY2027 reported. Revenue $81.6B (+85% YoY, Beat), Data Center $75.2B (+92% YoY, Beat), EPS adj. $1.87 (Beat). Q2 Guidance $91B – $11B über Konsens. Kursreaktion: +1.4% AH, dann flat.

updates.title: Earnings Preview · NVDA Q1 FY2027
updates.teaser: NVDA reports May 20 After Close. Consensus: Revenue $78.8B (+79% YoY), EPS $1.77 (+127%). Key watch: Data Center vs. $72.9B, Q2 guidance, China/export controls.

updates.title: Technical Analysis · NVDA · Nvidia Corporation
updates.teaser: NVDA Daily – Bullish bias. Price +21.2% above SMA 200 ($185.97), all three Long AVWAPs reclaimed. Approaching resistance at $235.83 with two Gap Up zones providing structural support below.
